conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to B, as our conversation flowed easily while we planned to team up and approach others together, building a real sense of partnership right from the start. I also connected strongly with I, sharing strategies from our favorite games like chess and poker, which made me feel like we were truly on the same strategic wavelength. Additionally, E stood out because we opened up about our family struggles, creating a deep emotional bond that felt genuine and supportive. In contrast, I felt least connected to J, as our chat was more surface-level, focusing on basic excitement and general plans without much depth or shared insights.

I made several agreements during the conversations, such as teaming up with B to approach potential allies and discussing alliance-building with F and A to share goals and strategies early on. Going into the game, I trust B, I, and E the most because our discussions were open and aligned with my values, but I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, though I'll watch for inconsistencies in behavior.
